name: prompt registry validator emits a structured json record per prompt for downstream tooling
command: mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts: []\n' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"prompts_count":0' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
